title: Mario Paint Composer - Homestuck - Showtime (Original Mix)
description:
} Make MPC arrangements in a more hard-boiled manner.

3,000 views. Huh. Wouldn't have thought this would be that much more popular than my other stuff.

NEW YEARS UPDATE: MP3 goodness http://www.mediafire.com/?wzuy2kbntmz I noticed I flubbed a few parts and corrected those, then modified a couple others to sound more like the version heard in the comic (it has a nice little drum downbeat) and rather than reupload I decided to just MP3 it.

Only scrubs aren't refreshing http://www.mspaintadventures.com multiple times daily.

If you happen to read this, Andrew, you're an inspiration to us all. And the dudes who do your music are pretty awesome too. E: Except for that Boland guy I guess, he's kind of a prick.

If you like the tune, buy the original! http://homestuck.bandcamp.com/track/showtime-original-mix
